creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 197879
v1

Hi there

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to change the default behaviour of cmake.mk to be out of source tree builds.

The patch is attached and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/cmake-outsource.v1.diff


Feel free, to combine this one with pr 231982 .

Thanks, 
  Tobias
